reason: Authoritative lint + test bar — verify dart format / flutter analyze / flutter test pass and new widget tests cover clear-confirm dialog, collapse toggle, canvas surface height, and bottom-nav icon swap.
Re-check widget structure (const, prop ordering, no unnecessary Container) on every touched widget — StitchImageStrip, StitchPreviewCanvas, AppBottomNavBar, StitchEditorScreen.
Re-check that the canvas-fills-container change still honors WindowSizeClass dispatch (no naked width checks introduced) on both compact / medium and expanded / large branches.
Re-check that the collapse flag is local widget state (not on StitchEditorState) and that clear() is dispatched via the controller, not by mutating the import provider directly from the widget.
